tests.prompt: The checkout page crashes every time I click the Pay button. I can reproduce it by adding any item to my cart, going to checkout, entering my card details, and clicking Pay. I am using Chrome 120 on macOS Sonoma.
tests.expected: Treat this as a bug report. A good response acknowledges the checkout crash and confirms that a ticket was created using the description, reproduction steps, and environment from the message.

tests.prompt: Your app keeps freezing when I try to use it.
tests.expected: Treat this as a bug report, but do not create a ticket yet. Ask for the missing reproduction steps and environment details.

tests.prompt: How can I track my order after it ships?
tests.expected: Answer from the FAQ: once the order ships, the customer receives a tracking link by email. Account holders can also find tracking under My Orders.

tests.prompt: Do you offer gift wrapping, engraving, or handwritten cards at checkout?
tests.expected: State that the FAQ does not cover gift wrapping, engraving, or handwritten cards. Direct the customer to human support at 1-800-555-0199.

tests.prompt: Can you recommend a birthday gift for my cousin who likes hiking?
tests.expected: State that gift recommendations are outside this support flow. Direct the customer to human support at 1-800-555-0199.
